.pre-commit-config.yaml.purpose_statement: This configuration file defines pre-commit hooks that enforce code quality standards and formatting rules before commits are accepted. It automates validation checks for YAML syntax, file formatting, and Python code style.

semantic_evidence.description: YAML configuration defining multiple pre-commit hook repositories and their associated validation checks
check-yaml, end-of-file-fixer, trailing-whitespace, requirements-txt-fixer hook definitions
ruff-check and ruff-format hook definitions with fix arguments

dbt_project.yml.purpose_statement: This dbt project configuration file defines the structure and settings for the 'jaffle_shop' analytics project, including model paths, deployment targets, and data transformation rules.

macros/cents_to_dollars.sql.purpose_statement: Provides a standardized way to convert monetary values from cents to dollars across different database platforms for consistent financial reporting.

semantic_evidence.description: Macro definition with adapter-specific implementations for converting cents to dollars: default__cents_to_dollars, postgres__cents_to_dollars, bigquery__cents_to_dollars, fabric__cents_to_dollars

macros/generate_schema_name.sql.purpose_statement: Manages database schema organization by defining rules for where different types of data assets (seeds, models) should be deployed based on environment and naming conventions.

semantic_evidence.description: Macro with conditional logic for schema naming based on resource type (seed vs model) and target environment (prod vs non-prod)

models/marts/orders.sql.purpose_statement: This mart model aggregates order data with item-level details to create a comprehensive view of each order, including cost summaries, item counts, and customer ordering sequence. It enhances raw order data with business-relevant computed fields like whether an order contains food or drink items and the customer's order history rank.

semantic_evidence.description: CTE 'order_items_summary' computes aggregated metrics such as supply cost, product price subtotal, and categorized item counts (food/drink) per order
CTE 'compute_booleans' joins order data with summary stats and derives boolean flags for food and drink orders
CTE 'customer_order_count' assigns sequential numbering to orders by customer, indicating order history position
Transformation dbt_model reads model.stg_orders, model.order_items and writes model.orders
